description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial shipping container with a weathered blue exterior and visible rust patches along the edges and corners. The container features corrugated metal sides and top, providing structural strength and a rugged appearance. Prominently displayed on the side is the word 'UMBRA' in large, white, stenciled letters, accompanied by a shield-like logo. The front face has two large doors, each with visible hinges and a locking mechanism, as well as faded white stenciled text indicating specifications such as 'MAX GR. CAP.' and 'TARE'. The surface is heavily worn, with dirt, scratches, and rust suggesting long-term outdoor use. This type of container is commonly found in shipping yards, construction sites, or urban storage areas.
description: A large, blue, weathered metal shipping container with rust, stenciled markings, and double front doors. Prominent 'UMBRA' logo and industrial wear suggest heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, blue metal doors with faded white stenciled text and visible rust, including a handle and locking bar.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the container, with the 'UMBRA' logo and shield in white, and extensive rust and dirt on the corrugated surface.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with two doors, faded markings, and significant weathering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the 'UMBRA' logo and shield, with similar weathering and rust as the other side.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: large white 'UMBRA' logo and shield on sides, faded white stenciled text on doors
attribute_handles_or_grips: one handle per door on the front face
